name: Ritual
definition: A way to cast a spell you have prepared without using a spell slot
full_text: If you have a spell prepared that has the Ritual tag, you can cast that spell as a Ritual. The Ritual version of a spell takes 10 minutes longer to cast than normal. It also doesn't expend a spell slot, which means the ritual version of a spell can't be cast at a higher level.

mechanics.requirement: Spell must be prepared with Ritual tag
mechanics.limitation: Can't be cast at higher level
